75540.subject: 🎆 Crypto market booms during holiday weekend
75540.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $62,917 (0.4%) | **ETH** $1,771 (0.6%) | **SOL** $81 (0.4%)

* Crypto [adds $90B](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2073444337849946493?s=20) to its total market cap over the last week

* Bitcoin [miner stress](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2073962912277012836?s=20) hits historical levels

* LIT [gains 40%](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/lighter/) on the week after Robinhood announces Lighter will [power perps](https://x.com/SonuSahu87/status/2073767197143654464?s=20) in their crypto wallet

* The next window to pass the CLARITY Act [closes in 1 month](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2073954519780823510?s=20)

* Binance records [$1.2B worth of net outflows](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2073716124374495692?s=20) on the week after failing to receive MiCA license

* Vitalik outlines “[Lean Ethereum](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2073562226422853636)” roadmap

* SpaceX COO donates [SpaceX shares to Trump accounts](https://x.com/Gwynne_Shotwell/status/2074064376810614926?s=20)

* SpaceX prototypes a consumer [AI handset](https://x.com/zerohedge/status/2072379950938698032?s=20) device

* Africa’s largest [crypto exchange](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2073043736670392405?s=20) launches perps product powered by Hyperliquid

* Revolut will [delist USDT](https://x.com/coinbureau/status/2073357324648055227?s=20) on August 31

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/crypto-market-booms-during-holiday-weekend

75535.body:

 [ https://cabinet.astromix.net ]
Добрый день, {firstName}!
7 июля Нептун начинает ретроградное движение в Овне -- и этот период продлится до 12 декабря 2026 года. Почти полгода планета тумана, интуиции и внутренних иллюзий будет работать с темами Овна: «кто я», «чего я хочу», «куда мне идти», «где начинается моя жизнь, а где я просто следую чужому сценарию».
Именно в такие периоды легко спутать усталость с «мне все надоело», импульс -- с истинным желанием, а тревогу -- с зовом перемен. Внутри может звучать один вопрос, но в двух частях: кто я сейчас -- и где мое место?
 Узнать свое место [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/astromap/master-astromap?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
Письменный анализ по астрокартографии отвечает на вторую часть этого вопроса конкретно. Он показывает, где именно на карте мира работают ваши планетарные линии -- какие места усиливают вас, а какие создают сопротивления. Полный персональный разбор под вашу дату, время и место рождения.
Что входит в анализ:
✦ Полная карта ваших планетарных линий по всему миру с расшифровкой; 
✦ Разбор вашего текущего места -- работает ли оно на вас прямо сейчас; 
✦ Лучшие регионы для карьеры, финансов, здоровья и любви 
✦ Точки максимальной силы -- и точки максимального риска лично для вас.
 Смотреть полную версию [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/astromap/master-astromap?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
Но локация -- только половина истории. Даже зная где, важно понимать кто вы там, где окажетесь. Особенно сейчас, когда Нептун размывает именно этот вопрос.
Разбор личности по натальной карте -- дополнение, которое отвечает на первую часть уравнения: ваши сильные стороны, паттерны поведения, то как вы любите и работаете. Вместе с картой места это дает полную картину -- не только куда, но и кто вы в эт

75534.subject: Has China obtained the world’s most important machine?
75534.body:
The Economist’s week ahead

Автор: The Economist


Автор: The Economist

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/has-china-obtained-worlds-most-important-machine-the-economist-at7ve?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BfqBdFSCoRcOAKHjXb%2BK1NQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1yH6HmHqeHxIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr94h2xk~n2-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr94h2xk-n2
  
Enjoying this newsletter? Get it in your inbox every weekend, as well as our daily round-up of The Economist’s best journalism, by signing up for free here. The extreme ultraviolet lithography machine, which makes the most advanced semiconductors, is arguably the world’s most important device. It is made only by ASML, a Dutch company. Now the Trump administration has thrown the firm into crisis by warning that one of its machines may have reached China. Impossible, says ASML. Elsewhere, women have made extraordinary professional gains in recent decades. Yet their progress at the very top has stalled: their share of C-suite positions is falling. We explain why the “Lean In” generation is leaning out. Roger McShane, US digital editor What to expect in the week ahead: ▸ On Tuesday Marine Le Pen, leader of France’s National Rally, will learn whether an appeals court upholds a ban on her running for office over the misuse of European funds. If it does, next April Jordan Bardella, her protégé, will be the populist-right party’s candidate for the French presidency. Polls suggest that Mr Bardella, a charismatic 30-year-old, would lead the voting in the first round of a presidential election by a crushing margin. ▸ NATO leaders will gather in Ankara, Turkey’s capital, on Tuesday and Wednesday. Writing for The Economist, Mark Rutte, the alliance’s secretary-general, says stronger defence is a crucial deterrent for Europe in “this more dangerous world”. He and other European leaders will hope that the meeting eases transatlantic tensions after a tempestuous year. ▸ SK Hynix, the world’s second-largest memory-chip maker, is looking to raise nearly $30bn when it debuts on America’s Nasdaq exchange on Friday. Its listing could match the $29.4bn raised by Saudi Aramco’s initial public offering in 2019, a record until SpaceX’s $85.7bn IPO in June. Last month Hynix briefly overtook Samsung Electronics as South Korea’s most valuable company. The two firms dominate the market for high-bandwidth memory chips, which are crucial for artificial-intelligence models. Editor’s picks Has China obtained the world’s most important machine? The Dutch punch above their weight in technology transfers that shaped the modern world. In the 17th century their financial and farming innovations spread to Britain, laying the ground for the Industrial Revol

Fear and Greed is at
27
(Fear)
this morning. Bitcoin bounced sharply to
$63K
over the long US holiday weekend from a 21-month low below $58K,
driven largely by short liquidations as thin order books
amplified the move. Whether that recovery holds is now the
central question heading into the week.

Meanwhile the structural calendar kept moving. Ethereum just had
its biggest protocol announcement in years. A senator moved to
ban officials from launching meme coins. And whale behaviour
on-chain is flashing a signal worth watching.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Bitcoin ETF Outflows Just Hit a Record Streak

US spot Bitcoin ETFs shed approximately $527 million last
week, marking eight consecutive weeks of net outflows, the
longest streak since the products launched.

The run has now pulled billions from crypto products even as BTC
briefly recovered over the holiday weekend.

What was the single strongest inflow day during the record
